name: hydrofoil
description: Clean, operator-friendly live media control plane on SRS

scripts.env:prod: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const t='.env.prod.example';const d='.env.prod';if(fs.existsSync(d)){console.error(d+' already exists — edit it or delete first');process.exit(1)}fs.copyFileSync(t,d);console.log('Created '+d+' from '+t+'. Edit CHANGE_ME values before npm run docker:prod')"
scripts.docker:prod:build: docker compose --env-file .env.prod -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml build control-api media-worker admin-ui
